TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mntuting kesun tnsapah bukung paru/seediq mdudul ka Panen, niqal kingal ali msuupu mmqedil mosa lmiqu wada mgedang eluw. Peyah theya asi qbhangi ka hrengan pwau.Mheyu kingal knbtunux riso ka berah na Panay, mesa riso"Kongcu Panay,wada ini pGaya rrudan mu, kii wada daha syusan,kii wada pklihan Sucu di. Mpmsqedil mu ka isu, kii klkela/truura su qmita yaku" bobo na, klaali mosa lmiqu msterung surang ka Panay. Niqal kingal ali, madis rahul sseediq muuyas uyas smrai berah rhengun na Panay ka surang. Qmita ka tnsapah Panay, kela naq skkingal quyu mlehe,mskluwi bale kana ka dheya. Ani si mkere bale lnlungan na psterung Sucu ka Panay.Ali mpsterung ciida, meyah berah rhengun sapah na Panay ka Sucu,Pdilun harung ka seediq mddayo,klhangun daha Panay dehuk ssiyo yayung keuhu qlmiqu, mesa ka Panay" tama ma bubu,pqlhangun mu ka nniqal hini, meyah namu phuling de,qulung bale niqal ngalun namu ccamac" mhedu rmengo kari di mdaadis surang mquri lnguwan truma,bobo na, mphepah boxin kana ka ssiyo lnguwan. Dehuk saya,smkuxul bale paha gidi phepah boxin tunux ka mmqedil Rukaycu,psaun daha lnlungan/ qcahul truma ka kongcu Panay.
S.PHON: mntutiŇč k…ôsun tnsapańß bukuŇč pa…ĺu/s…ô…ôdiq mdudul ka pan…ôn, niqal kiŇčal ali msuupu mmq…ôdil mosa lmiqu wada mg…ôdaŇč …ôluw. p…ôańß tńß…ôa asi qbńßaŇči ka ńß…ĺ…ôŇčan pwau.mńß…ôu kiŇčal knbtunux …ĺiso ka b…ô…ĺańß na panaj, m…ôsa …ĺiso"koŇč ¶u panaj,wada ini pgaja …ĺ…ĺudan mu, kii wada dańßa sjusan,kii wada pklińßan su ¶u di. mpmsq…ôdil mu ka isu, kii klk…ôla/t…ĺuu…ĺa su qmita jaku" bobo na, klaali mosa lmiqu mst…ô…ĺuŇč su…ĺaŇč ka panaj. niqal kiŇčal ali, madis …ĺańßul ss…ô…ôdiq muujas ujas sm…ĺai b…ô…ĺańß …ĺńß…ôŇčun na panaj ka su…ĺaŇč. qmita ka tnsapańß panaj, k…ôla naq skkiŇčal quju ml…ôńß…ô,mskluwi bal…ô kana ka dńß…ôa. ani si mk…ô…ĺ…ô bal…ô lnluŇčan na pst…ô…ĺuŇč su ¶u ka panaj.ali mpst…ô…ĺuŇč ¶iida, m…ôańß b…ô…ĺańß …ĺńß…ôŇčun sapańß na panaj ka su ¶u,pdilun ńßa…ĺuŇč ka s…ô…ôdiq mddajo,klńßaŇčun dańßa panaj d…ôńßuk ssijo jajuŇč k…ôuńßu qlmiqu, m…ôsa ka panaj" tama ma bubu,pqlńßaŇčun mu ka nniqal ńßini, m…ôańß namu pńßuliŇč d…ô,quluŇč bal…ô niqal Ňčalun namu ¶ ¶ama ¶" mńß…ôdu …ĺm…ôŇčo ka…ĺi di mdaadis su…ĺaŇč mqu…ĺi lŇčuwan t…ĺuma,bobo na, mpńß…ôpańß boxin kana ka ssijo lŇčuwan. d…ôńßuk saja,smkuxul bal…ô pańßa gidi pńß…ôpańß boxin tunux ka mmq…ôdil …ĺukaj ¶u,psaun dańßa lnluŇčan/ q ¶ańßul t…ĺuma ka koŇč ¶u panaj.
S.FORM: Mntuting kesun tnsapah bukung paru/seediq mdudul ka Panen, niqal kingal ali msuupu mmqedil mosa lmiqu wada mgedang eluw. Peyah theya asi qbhangi ka hrengan pwau.Mheyu kingal knbtunux riso ka berah na Panay, mesa riso"Kongcu Panay,wada ini pGaya rrudan mu, kii wada daha syusan,kii wada pklihan Sucu di. Mpmsqedil mu ka isu, kii klkela/truura su qmita yaku" bobo na, klaali mosa lmiqu msterung surang ka Panay. Niqal kingal ali, madis rahul sseediq muuyas uyas smrai berah rhengun na Panay ka surang. Qmita ka tnsapah Panay, kela naq skkingal quyu mlehe,mskluwi bale kana ka dheya. Ani si mkere bale lnlungan na psterung Sucu ka Panay.Ali mpsterung ciida, meyah berah rhengun sapah na Panay ka Sucu,Pdilun harung ka seediq mddayo,klhangun daha Panay dehuk ssiyo yayung keuhu qlmiqu, mesa ka Panay" tama ma bubu,pqlhangun mu ka nniqal hini, meyah namu phuling de,qulung bale niqal ngalun namu ccamac" mhedu rmengo kari di mdaadis surang mquri lnguwan truma,bobo na, mphepah boxin kana ka ssiyo lnguwan. Dehuk saya,smkuxul bale paha gidi phepah boxin tunux ka mmqedil Rukaycu,psaun daha lnlungan/ qcahul truma ka kongcu Panay.
S.PHON: mntutiŇč k…ôsun tnsapańß bukuŇč pa…ĺu/s…ô…ôdiq mdudul ka pan…ôn, niqal kiŇčal ali msuupu mmq…ôdil mosa lmiqu wada mg…ôdaŇč …ôluw. p…ôańß tńß…ôa asi qbńßaŇči ka ńß…ĺ…ôŇčan pwau.mńß…ôu kiŇčal knbtunux …ĺiso ka b…ô…ĺańß na panaj, m…ôsa …ĺiso"koŇč ¶u panaj,wada ini pgaja …ĺ…ĺudan mu, kii wada dańßa sjusan,kii wada pklińßan su ¶u di. mpmsq…ôdil mu ka isu, kii klk…ôla/t…ĺuu…ĺa su qmita jaku" bobo na, klaali mosa lmiqu mst…ô…ĺuŇč su…ĺaŇč ka panaj. niqal kiŇčal ali, madis …ĺańßul ss…ô…ôdiq muujas ujas sm…ĺai b…ô…ĺańß …ĺńß…ôŇčun na panaj ka su…ĺaŇč. qmita ka tnsapańß panaj, k…ôla naq skkiŇčal quju ml…ôńß…ô,mskluwi bal…ô kana ka dńß…ôa. ani si mk…ô…ĺ…ô bal…ô lnluŇčan na pst…ô…ĺuŇč su ¶u ka panaj.ali mpst…ô…ĺuŇč ¶iida, m…ôańß b…ô…ĺańß …ĺńß…ôŇčun sapańß na panaj ka su ¶u,pdilun ńßa…ĺuŇč ka s…ô…ôdiq mddajo,klńßaŇčun dańßa panaj d…ôńßuk ssijo jajuŇč k…ôuńßu qlmiqu, m…ôsa ka panaj" tama ma bubu,pqlńßaŇčun mu ka nniqal ńßini, m…ôańß namu pńßuliŇč d…ô,quluŇč bal…ô niqal Ňčalun namu ¶ ¶ama ¶" mńß…ôdu …ĺm…ôŇčo ka…ĺi di mdaadis su…ĺaŇč mqu…ĺi lŇčuwan t…ĺuma,bobo na, mpńß…ôpańß boxin kana ka ssijo lŇčuwan. d…ôńßuk saja,smkuxul bal…ô pańßa gidi pńß…ôpańß boxin tunux ka mmq…ôdil …ĺukaj ¶u,psaun dańßa lnluŇčan/ q ¶ańßul t…ĺuma ka koŇč ¶u panaj.
